rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANN LEAL THIBEAULT
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, To Paul Thibeault, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Denied. The pending creditor's claim, which has not yet been acted upon by the executor, is not yet a proceeding before the Court, and the petitions for probate have already been decided. That said, however, the Court encourages the parties to engage in exchanges of information that can promote the possibility of resolution. No sanctions. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, February 21, 2017.
